---
title: "Hennepin County Visualizations"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Hennepin County Visualizations}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Only evaluate chunks if sf is available to avoid breaking installation when it's just a 'Suggests'
has_sf <- requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    eval = has_sf,
    fig.width = 7,
    fig.height = 5,
    dpi = 300,
    fig.align = "center",
    out.width = "100%"
)

if(has_sf) library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
```

## Load Toy Baseline Data

This makes the vignette portable by loading data from the installed package.

```{r load-toy-data, include=FALSE}
acs_path <- system.file("extdata", "toy_acs_zcta_hennepin.csv", package = "shellgame")
if (acs_path == "" && interactive()) {
  acs_path <- file.path("..", "inst", "extdata", "toy_acs_zcta_hennepin.csv")
}
stopifnot(nchar(acs_path) > 0)
acs <- readr::read_csv(acs_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
stopifnot("zcta" %in% names(acs))
```

## Load TIGER/Line Shapes

Users need to download these shapefiles locally.

```{r load-shapes, include=FALSE}
county_dir <- "/Users/phinnmarkson/Desktop/Spring_Semester/tl_2022_us_county"
zcta_dir <- "/Users/phinnmarkson/Desktop/Spring_Semester/tl_2020_us_zcta510"

counties <- st_read(file.path(county_dir, "tl_2022_us_county.shp"), quiet = TRUE)
zctas <- st_read(file.path(zcta_dir, "tl_2020_us_zcta510.shp"), quiet = TRUE)

hennepin <- counties %>% filter(STATEFP == "27", COUNTYFP == "053")

zctas <- st_transform(zctas, st_crs(hennepin))

# Geometry intersection set (94)
zctas_94 <- zctas[st_intersects(zctas, hennepin, sparse = FALSE), ]

# Relationship membership baseline set (74)
zctas_74 <- zctas %>% filter(ZCTA5CE10 %in% acs$zcta)

# Geometry-only extras (20)
extra_20 <- zctas_94 %>% filter(!(ZCTA5CE10 %in% zctas_74$ZCTA5CE10))
```

## Plot 1: Baseline Membership

This plot shows the 74 ZCTAs used in the baseline analysis with relationship-based membership.

```{r fig-baseline-membership}
p1 <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = zctas_74, alpha = 0.35, fill = "lightblue") +
    geom_sf(data = hennepin, fill = NA, linewidth = 1) +
    coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm"),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(b = 5)),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(margin = margin(b = 10))
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Hennepin County: ZCTAs Used in Baseline (n=74)",
        subtitle = "ZCTA membership defined by relationship-based inclusion"
    )

print(p1)
```

## Plot 2: Geometry vs Relationship Discrepancy

This plot highlights the difference between geometric intersection and relationship-based membership.

```{r fig-discrepancy}
p2 <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = zctas_74, fill = NA, linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_sf(data = extra_20, linewidth = 0.25, fill = "grey60") +
    geom_sf(data = hennepin, fill = NA, linewidth = 1.0) +
    coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm"),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(b = 5)),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(margin = margin(b = 10)),
        plot.caption = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10))
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Hennepin County: Geometry vs Relationship Membership",
        subtitle = paste0(
            "Geometric intersection: ", nrow(zctas_94),
            " | Relationship baseline: ", nrow(zctas_74),
            " | Geometry-only: ", nrow(extra_20)
        ),
        caption = "Grey polygons: appear only under geometric intersection"
    )

print(p2)
```

## Export PNGs

Save the plots as PNG files for use in documentation.

```{r save-pngs, include=FALSE}
dir.create("man/figures", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

ggsave("man/figures/ZCTA_Membership.png", plot = p1, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("man/figures/HennepinZCTABaseline.png", plot = p2, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Summary

These visualizations demonstrate:

1. **Baseline ZCTAs**: The 74 ZCTAs with relationship-based membership to Hennepin County
2. **Membership Discrepancy**: The 20 additional ZCTAs that appear only under geometric intersection

All plots now include proper title margins to prevent text cutoff.
